rationale: The only linkage evidence is a single DOI match (reference_index 9) with no reference text or in-text citation context, so there is no direct signal of how substantively the 2011 paper is used. The citing paper’s notes focus on dynamic ego-network evolution and online artist success, while the cited paper is about contagion in CPG diffusion—topically related but not enough to infer a clearly central role. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop as obvious mention-only, but also not strong enough to clearly keep.
